description_long: This is a large, luxurious sectional sofa upholstered in a dark, textured fabric with a subtle pattern. The sofa features a deep, curved profile with prominent, rolled armrests on both ends, each adorned with decorative piping and a metallic accent at the base. The backrest is high and continuous, gently curving to match the armrests, and is accented with tufted detailing along the central section. Five loose, square cushions in a contrasting light gray color are arranged along the back, providing both comfort and visual contrast. The seat consists of multiple individual cushions, each thick and plush, matching the main upholstery. The sofa sits low to the ground, with short, barely visible legs that are likely recessed or hidden beneath the frame.
description: A large, dark, curved sectional sofa with rolled armrests, tufted backrest, and five light gray loose cushions. The upholstery features a subtle textured pattern and the sofa sits low with minimal visible legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full curved profile, five light gray cushions, tufted backrest, and both rolled armrests with metallic accents.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the curve of the armrest, and the arrangement of the cushions along the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, high backrest and the subtle pattern of the dark upholstery, with minimal leg visibility.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view mirroring view 1, showing the other armrest, seat depth, and cushion arrangement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Five loose, square back cushions in light gray are evenly spaced along the backrest; seat consists of multiple thick, individual cushions matching the main upholstery; all cushions are uniform in size and unattached.
attribute_armrest_style: Both armrests are present, high and rolled with a rounded profile, extending slightly above the seat; each features decorative piping and a metallic accent at the base.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are short, minimally visible, likely recessed or hidden beneath the frame, with no distinctive decorative features apparent.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous, and gently curved backrest with tufted detailing in the central section; backrest is integrated with the armrests for a unified appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is dark with a subtle, textured pattern, possibly floral or damask, and features tufted detailing on the backrest; overall finish is matte and soft.
